core_principles: Legibility at Distance: TV screens must be readable from 10 meters away
High Contrast: Dark backgrounds with neon/bright accents for status
Functional Beauty: No unnecessary decoration, every pixel serves data visibility
Touch Friendly: Controls must be large enough for gloved hands (Back Office on Tablet)

usage.headings: Use 'Chivo' for all section titles and dashboard headers.
usage.numbers: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all timers, counts, and critical metrics.
usage.body: Use 'Inter' for configuration forms and general text.

rules: Always use dark mode. No light mode toggle.
Status colors must be vibrant and self-luminous against the dark background.
Use semi-transparent backgrounds with solid borders for status cards.
Text on TV screens must be pure white (#ffffff) or high-contrast status color.

grid_strategies.tv_display: flex flex-col h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden p-4 md:p-12 justify-between

structure: Header: Line Name (Top Left), Status Badge (Top Right)
Footer: Takt Count (Left), Next Break/Shift End (Right)

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/20 active:scale-95
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-red-500/20
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-600 hover:border-slate-500 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.control_large: h-24 text-2xl font-bold uppercase tracking-widest border-2

cards.style: bg-slate-800/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-700 text-slate-100 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 rounded-md h-12 px-4

status_indicators.style: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide border

visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid complex gradients. Use subtle linear gradients for active states: bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-800 to-slate-900.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings (blue-500) for all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-live='polite' for countdown updates to avoid screen reader spam, or 'off' if purely visual.

assets.logo: Use a simple typographic logo or a geometric industrial icon.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install fonts 'Chivo' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts or Fontsource.
2. THEME: Enforce dark mode in tailwind.config.js and index.css.
3. TV PAGE: This is the most critical view. It must be full screen, no scrollbars. Use '100vh'. Text must be massive. Breakpoints: optimize for 1920x1080 (HD TV).
4. SOUNDS: Implement sound alerts using standard HTML5 Audio. Ensure sounds are loaded and ready. Browsers block auto-play, so ensure a 'Start' interaction enables audio context.
5. BACK OFFICE: Use a Bento Grid layout for the dashboard list of lines.
6. COMPONENTS: Use Shadcn UI for the configuration forms but style them to match the Industrial Dark theme (slate-900 backgrounds).
7. STATE: Use a robust state management (Context or specialized hook) to handle the countdown timer to avoid drift. Sync with backend timestamp, don't just decrement locally without check.
8. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
